evidence: "A mix between AI and Blade Runner and very thought provoking series."
"I enjoyed both movies and each had things that made for a good family film."
"I found things on the second viewing I did not notice in the first."
"The story is an interesting one, but the dialogue does not really fit."
"This one was action from beginning to end."
"This is really a good movie with lots of action."
"The entire cast is outstanding and the story is fantastic."
"Really good acting, but the voices were not quite as good as the theatre soundtrack."
"If you are a Quinten Tarrantino fan, you have to have this movie."
"It is great not having to watch commercials as they are constant on SYFY."
"I thought this was such a great movie in the theatre and had to have it for my home movie library."
"It was too dark for me. Just could not get into it."
"My wife loves this movie and wanted me to purchase it to be part of our DVD library."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of sci-fi and action genres, with a preference for fast-paced narratives and high production quality. They show some brand loyalty, particularly towards well-known directors, and appreciate sensory experiences in their viewing choices.
